data.body: Checkpoint 1/6: Task spec read. Testing mode: RED. Will create tests/test-doc-links.sh that extracts and validates links from README.md and plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md. Script should fail now (README is near-empty, INSTALL.md is at plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md). Need to clarify: ticket says INSTALL.md but file lives at plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md — will scope to README.md at repo root and plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md.
